matched_pairs.gt_feature: a rectangular float having a divided top platform and four walls
a set of four pontoons, wherein the cross-shaped support is configured to hold each one of the four pontoons between a different opening formed by the cross-shape.

a first triangular support connected to a first side of the divided top platform; and a second triangular support  connected to a second side of the divided top platform, wherein each triangular support is equipped with mounting hardware configured to connect to the bi-facial solar photovoltaic panel.
a plurality of plastic-coated stainless steel wires, connected between a first concrete block and a first corner of the rectangular float;

The floating solar photovoltaic system of claim 1, further comprising a junction box operatively connected to a bottom side of the bi-facial solar photovoltaic panel; a current sensor connected to the junction box; and a voltage sensor connected to the junction box, wherein each of the current sensor and the voltage sensor are configured to wirelessly transmit current measurements and voltage measurements respectively to the data logger, wherein the data logger is configured to wirelessly transmit the current measurements and voltage measurements to a central database configured to store the current measurements and voltage measurements

The floating solar photovoltaic system of claim 4, further comprising an electrical cable connected between the junction box and a load, wherein the electrical cable is configured to transmit power generated by the bi-facial solar photovoltaic panel to the load.

The floating solar photovoltaic system of claim 1, further comprising a plurality of sensors including at least one temperature sensor located on a top side of the bi-facial solar photovoltaic panel, at least one temperature sensor located on a bottom side of the bi-facial solar photovoltaic panel, and a solar irradiance sensor located on a top side of the bi-facial solar photovoltaic panel; and a data logger located on the top platform and operatively connected to each one of the plurality of sensors, wherein the data logger is configured to collect sensor measurements at predetermined time intervals and wirelessly transmit the sensor measurements to a central database configured to store the sensor measurements.

failures.affected_element: Common Output of Measured or Calculated Force

matched_pairs.gt_feature: A power meter detects pedalling force, wherein, the force can be detected from a single crank arm, either the left or the right crank arm.
In the one-leg specification, one power meter is mounted to the left crank arm and the other to the right crank arm.
In the double-leg specification, a single power meter detects the pedalling force from one crank arm i.e. only one power meter is mounted on either the left or right crank arm.
In the one-leg specification, the pedalling force detected by each power meter is summed to calculate the total pedalling force of both crank arms.
In the double-leg specification, the system calculates the imaginary pedalling force for both left and right crank arms based on the detected force from the single crank arm.

failures.affected_element: Threaded Boss Screw Actuator, Rotational Release for Free Sliding

matched_pairs.gt_feature: An intermediate friction element may be disposed between the end of the screw shaft and the inner tube for uniform pressure distribution.
An additional friction pad is connected to, or engaged by, the end of the screw shaft.
A height adjustable actuation mechanism which includes a screw shaft threadably engaged with a boss on an outer tube.
An end of the screw applies a friction force to the outer surface of an “inner” support tube when in an engaged position, and when rotated to a disengaged position the friction force is relieved.
When the screw shaft is rotated to the disengaged position, this pressure is released, allowing the tube to move freely with the assistance of the gas spring.
